Percentile threshold 97.0th of 30-day rolling distribution

Min OI (per signal) $20M post-universe safety net
Execution window ±30min around 00:00 · 08:00 · 16:00 UTC
Vol regime gate LOW only ATR vs 20-period SMA
Direction toggles LONG ON SHORT ON
Sizing $25 margin × 10x = $250 notional half-size validation

Breakout

AWAITING SIGNAL Bot is live. No N-bar high/low has printed with ATR > ATR_SMA and ADX > threshold since launch.

Strategy parameters

Donchian entry period 55 bars N-bar high/low channel
Donchian exit period 20 bars opposite-side cross triggers exit
ADX threshold > 20 trend-strength gate at entry
ADX exit threshold < 15 trend dying → exit even if price ok
SL distance 2.5 × ATR adverse-move stop
Sizing $25 margin × 10x = $250 notional per signal
Slot cap 2 concurrent

Pair

AWAITING SIGNAL Bot is live. ETH/BTC ratio z-score hasn't reached |z| ≥ 2 since launch.

Strategy parameters

Pair ETHUSDT / BTCUSDT ratio = ETH close ÷ BTC close
Z-score window 30 bars rolling mean/std lookback (1d)
Entry threshold |z| ≥ 2.0 extreme spread → buy cheap leg, short rich leg
Exit threshold |z| ≤ 0.5 reversion done → close both legs
Max hold 5 bars time-stop — mean reversion is fast or doesn't happen
Adverse-move stop |z| past 4.0 spread is getting worse — cut
Sizing $50 margin × 10x per leg = $500 notional each side, net $0
CLOSED PAIRS 0

Reversal

PAUSED REVERSAL_PAUSED=true — RSI(VWAP) + extreme-reversal strategy (Alex Carter spec) awaiting backtest validation.

Strategy parameters

RSI length 5 computed on session VWAP, not close
Oversold / overbought < 15.0 / > 85.0 extreme bands (tighter than standard 30/70)
Range multiplier ≥ 2.5× vs 14-bar SMA(range) — capitulation candle
Dot polarity threshold 30% close in bottom/top X% of bar range
SL distance 1.5 × ATR adverse-move stop
Time stop 7 bars mean-reversion that hasn't reverted by then probably won't
Sizing $25 margin × 10x = $250 notional

Scalping

Short-timeframe trade-frequency strategies. The vol-expansion scalp fires on rare 5-minute liquidity-induced breakouts; the dual-SMA crossover catches multi-day swings on 1-hour trend transitions. Both run small fixed-bracket risk per signal.

S

Phase M — 5-minute Volatility-Expansion Scalp

Vol-expansion + momentum + new-N-bar-high + body color, with Phase M.2 higher-TF / volume / RSI filter stack.
AWAITING SIGNAL Bot is live. No 5m bar has printed vol-expansion + 20-bar momentum + 20-bar new high/low + matching body color since launch.

Strategy parameters

Volatility expansion SMA(range, 10) > SMA(range, 50) recent range exceeds longer baseline
Momentum lookback 20 bars close vs. close-N-ago direction agreement
New high/low lookback 20 bars close exceeds prior N-bar extreme
Stop loss / Take profit −1.5% / +3.0% 2:1 R/R fixed bracket; breakeven WR = 33.3%
Re-entry cooldown 600 s prevents whipsaw chains after exit
Sizing $10 margin × 10x = $100 notional per signal
Slot cap 3 concurrent

Configured assets (5)

Asset Symbol Timeframe SHORT enabled
BTC_5M BTCUSDT 5m ON
ETH_5M ETHUSDT 5m ON
XRP_5M XRPUSDT 5m ON
DOGE_5M DOGEUSDT 5m ON

X

Phase N.2 — 1-hour Dual-SMA Crossover

Fires ONLY on the bar where SMA(20) crosses SMA(50). No filter stack — the primitive's own selectivity is the gate.
AWAITING SIGNAL Bot is live. No fresh SMA20/SMA50 crossover has fired on any tracked asset since launch.

Strategy parameters

Crossover signal SMA(close, 20) × SMA(close, 50) enters ONLY on the bar where fast crosses slow
Stop loss / Take profit −1.0% / +2.0% 1:2 R/R fixed bracket; breakeven WR = 33.3%
Re-entry cooldown 600 s belt-and-suspenders against rapid whipsaw crosses
Sizing $10 margin × 10x = $100 notional per signal
Slot cap 3 concurrent

Annual PnL per row is discounted on display by √(n/20) — a row with n=5 trades shows ≈50% of its raw projected number; n=20+ shows the full number. The Observed · 30d annualized card is the reality check: if it's far below the modeled headline, the gap tells you which side to trust. PF capped at >10 on display to avoid three-digit ratios; ∞ means the backtest window had no losses (treat as directional only). Past performance doesn't predict future regime.
